lesson.title: Seasoning Basics
lesson.description: Learn the importance of seasoning in cooking and how to properly season various dishes.
steps: 1. Understand the different types of seasonings (salt, herbs, spices).
2. Taste your dish before seasoning to gauge its flavor.
3. Start with a small amount of seasoning and adjust to taste.
4. Remember that seasoning can enhance flavors but should not overpower them.
safety: Avoid over-salting, which can lead to health issues.
Always taste as you go to ensure balanced flavors.
milestones: Successfully season a dish to enhance its flavor without overpowering it.
